items.title: The looks turning heads on the Met Gala carpet
items.dek: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.
items.body: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.

items.title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
items.dek: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.
items.body: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.
